name: cnic_gemini_request_blueprint
goal: Send CNIC image uploaded by user from frontend to Gemini and receive strict JSON-only OCR result.

formData.image: <required File object from frontend user upload>
formData.cnicNumber: <optional typed CNIC from user, format XXXXX-XXXXXXX-X>

parts.text: You are an OCR extractor for Pakistani CNIC cards. Inspect only the front image. First decide whether a CNIC is visible in the image. Return ONLY valid JSON. Do not include markdown, comments, code fences, or extra text. If no CNIC is visible, return {"cnic_available": false, "cnic": null, "dob": null, "name": null, "father_or_husband_name": null, "gender": null, "nationality": null, "issue_date": null, "expiry_date": null, "address": null, "confidence": 0, "raw_text": "", "ocr_backend": "gemini", "warnings": ["no_cnic_detected"] }. If a CNIC is visible, return {"cnic_available": true, "cnic": string|null, "dob": string|null, "name": string|null, "father_or_husband_name": string|null, "gender": string|null, "nationality": string|null, "issue_date": string|null, "expiry_date": string|null, "address": string|null, "confidence": number, "raw_text": string, "ocr_backend": "gemini", "warnings": string[] }. Normalize CNIC as XXXXX-XXXXXXX-X. Normalize DOB and date fields as DD-MM-YYYY when possible. Keep the field names and JSON structure exactly the same every time. Confidence must be between 0 and 1.
